steps.action: Generates end-of-day transaction export file in CSV format.
steps.pain_point: Batch-only; no real-time visibility. File format inconsistencies require manual cleanup.

steps.action: Manually downloads CSV from ledger portal and uploads to shared reconciliation spreadsheet.
steps.pain_point: Error-prone manual transfer; version control issues with shared spreadsheets.

steps.action: Generates separate settlement status report via email distribution list.
steps.pain_point: No standard identifier linking gateway records to ledger entries; analyst must manually cross-reference.

steps.action: Manually matches ledger entries to gateway settlement records using VLOOKUP in Excel.
steps.pain_point: Takes 2–3 hours per day; high error rate; no audit trail for matching decisions.

steps.action: Emails discrepancy list to relevant team for investigation; awaits response.
steps.pain_point: No SLA on responses; average 3-day turnaround; email threads are not auditable.
